overall.description: Aerial flight through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, captured from a flying vehicle navigating between illuminated skyscrapers. The footage showcases neon-lit highways, massive digital billboards, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with illuminated digital road surface advertising

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over the illuminated highway, maintaining high altitude above the digital road surface

entered.detail: illuminated rectangular advertising panels embedded in the highway surface displaying various images
tall building with multiple vertical digital screens displaying advertisements
curved highway ramp structure with safety barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude aerial view of a futuristic highway at night. The road surface is covered with large illuminated digital panels displaying advertisements, while the camera vehicle flies steadily forward over the multi-lane road. Sparse traffic moves along the highway below.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with cylindrical media tower and highway interchanges

events.description: initiates a banking left turn away from the digital highway surface
passing the cylindrical media tower and descending toward lower altitude over city intersections

agents.ego_description: banking left and descending while navigating around the cylindrical tower, transitioning from highway to urban airspace

entered.detail: large cylindrical building wrapped with continuous digital screens displaying rotating advertisements
multi-level road intersection with traffic lights and crossing streets visible below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle banks left and descends, leaving the illuminated highway behind. A prominent cylindrical building with wraparound digital screens dominates the center of the frame as the camera flies past it. The scene transitions to show city intersections and highway interchanges below, with streetlights illuminating the road network.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense skyscraper canyon with vertical neon billboards and rooftop landing zone

events.description: entering the dense skyscraper canyon with buildings closing in on both sides
intense lens flare and chromatic aberration from bright neon signs as descending toward street level

agents.ego_description: flying through the narrow canyon between skyscrapers while descending rapidly toward the landing pad

entered.detail: tall glass facade building with reflective windows forming the left wall of the urban canyon
tall glass facade building with massive vertical neon advertisements forming the right wall
large vertical digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements with cyan and orange neon lighting
illuminated landing zone with circular markings on a building rooftop

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow canyon between towering glass skyscrapers adorned with massive vertical neon billboards. The lighting shifts to intense neon tones with heavy lens flare effects as the camera descends toward a rooftop landing pad. The scene is enclosed by building walls on both sides, creating a claustrophobic urban corridor with bright chromatic aberration from the signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a wide, illuminated highway into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins with a high-altitude flight over a multi-lane road where the surface is embedded with glowing digital advertisements and sparse traffic. As the vehicle banks left and descends, the open highway gives way to a dense cityscape dominated by a massive cylindrical building wrapped in digital screens. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor between towering glass skyscrapers, where the lighting transforms into intense neon tones with heavy lens flares and chromatic aberration. Finally, the camera plunges deeper into this enclosed architectural gap, descending toward a rooftop landing pad surrounded by massive vertical billboards.
